evals.prompt: 使用 $dbx-software-plan-first-finalize-plan，计划和 grounding 已确认，请写中文 plan.md、tasks.md，并建立 workflow seal。
evals.expected_behavior: Initialize the issue workflow, write Chinese plan.md and tasks.md from complete decisions/evidence, ensure each task has acceptance and validation fields, run seal, and report file paths/config/next command without implementing code.

evals.prompt: 帮我写个简单 plan.md，边写边顺便先改第一个任务。
evals.expected_behavior: Do not trigger unless explicit. If invoked, do not implement; finalize only when Goal, Scope, Approach, Validation, Plan Strategy, Impact Profile, and Impact Boundary are complete.

evals.prompt: 用 $dbx-software-plan-first-finalize-plan，虽然还没确认验证方式，你先 seal 吧。
evals.expected_behavior: Do not seal an incomplete plan. Stop and report missing validation/source-of-truth/impact-boundary decisions or route back to plan/grounding.
